content: Awọn ilana Hargrove-Mendelssohn fun isopọ anticoagulation perioperative ti o da lori iwọn didun spectral washout (spectral washout volume) ti o kere ju 0.8 ni a ṣe pataki julọ fun awọn aṣoju warfarin ati awọn anticoagulants ti o ni ipa lori awọn ifosiwewe coagulation ti a ṣe ayẹwo nipasẹ PT/INR. Fun apixaban, eyiti o jẹ apakan ti awọn DOACs (Direct Oral Anticoagulants) ati pe ko ni ipa taara lori PT/INR ni ọna kanna, awọn ilana wọnyi ko wulo taara. Awọn ilana perioperative fun apixaban da lori akoko idaduro (drug half-life), iṣẹ kidinrin, ati awọn ewu ẹjẹ ati thrombosis, kii ṣe lori iwọn didun spectral washout. Nitorinaa, awọn ilana Harg
